name: Bellcore-dr1
recommended: General office, shared desks, users migrating from CUCM
description: Traditional business-phone ring. Familiar, clear, and easy to recognize.

name: Bellcore-dr2
recommended: Reception, front desk, common area phones
description: Classic cadence with a little more presence. Good where the phone needs to stand out.

name: Bellcore-dr3
recommended: Office staff, migration demos, shared workspaces
description: Another traditional ring pattern with a reliable desk-phone feel.

name: Sunrise
description: Bright and polished. Softer than a classic ring but still professional.

name: Chirp 1
description: Placeholder ringtone. Audio file still needs to be confirmed.

name: Delight
description: Pleasant melodic tone that feels modern without being distracting.

name: Evolve
recommended: IT, power users, modern office spaces
description: Clean modern tone with a tech-forward feel.

name: Mellow
description: Calmer tone for people who do not want an aggressive ring.

name: Mischief
recommended: Demo phones, labs, less formal teams
description: Playful and different. Useful when you want the ringtone to feel less standard.

name: Reflections
description: Smooth and professional with a softer notification style.

name: Ringer
description: Direct and attention-getting. Best where missed calls are a problem.

name: Ascent
description: Upbeat modern ring that works well as a default alternative.

name: Chirp 2 Candidate
description: Short chirp-style tone. Good for quick notifications and testing.

name: Incoming_EQ
description: More alert-style tone designed to cut through busier environments.

name: Vibes
recommended: Demo users, informal spaces, unique personal ring
description: More personality than a standard ringtone. Good for showing options in a demo.
